hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT ASSIGNMENT_ID, TO_CHAR(FROM_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS FROM_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS TO_DATE, CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(CREATION_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PERSON_ID, BILLING_ORGANISATION_ID, EU_ORGANISATION_ID, APPROVED_EXPENSES, ASG_ACTIVE, TO_CHAR(ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE, ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, TO_CHAR(ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AS ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE10, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9, AUTOMATIC_INVOICE, BASIC_SALARY, BILLING_CODE, BILLING_CODE_ID, BILLING_ORGANISATION_PERSON_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, COMMENTS, COST_CENTRE, CREATED_AS, ELEMENT_1, ELEMENT_2, ELEMENT_3, ELEMENT_4, ELEMENT_5, EQUIPMENT_DETAILS, EQUIPMENT_REQUIRED_YN, ETS_APPROVAL_NOTIFICATION_TO, EU_CONTACT_PERSON_ID, GST_EXEMPT, INVOICE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL, IS_DAILY, IS_START_END_TIME, JOB_TITLE, PAYROLL_NOTES, PAYSLIP_EMAIL, PAY_ARRANGEMENT, PAY_METHOD_ID, PREFERRED, RATE, RATE1, RATE2, RATE3, RATE4, RATE5, REFERENCE_NO_1, REFERENCE_NO_2, REFERENCE_NO_3, RESTRAINT_OF_TRADE, SERVICE_DESCRIPTION, SPECIAL_CONDITIONS, TERMINATION_NOTICE, TERMINATION_NOTICE_UNIT, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_ID, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_RATE_HIDDEN, TIMECARD_LAYOUT, TIMECARD_REQUIRED, TIMECARD_SECONDARY_APPROVAL_ID, TIMECARD_TERTIARY_APPROVAL_ID, TIMESHEET_NAME, TIMESHEET_UNITS, UNIT, WC_ORGANISATION_TYPE_FLAG, WC_ORG_CODE_RATE_LINK_ID, WORKING_STATE, WORK_END_TIME, WORK_START_TIME FROM HP_ASSIGNMENTS_D WHERE 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${frameworkGeneratedWhere} ${frameworkGeneratedOrderBy} FOR UPDATE

INSERT INTO HP_ASSIGNMENTS_D ( ASSIGNMENT_ID, FROM_DATE, TO_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PERSON_ID, BILLING_ORGANISATION_ID, EU_ORGANISATION_ID, APPROVED_EXPENSES, ASG_ACTIVE, ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE, ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER, ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE10, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9, AUTOMATIC_INVOICE, BASIC_SALARY, BILLING_CODE, BILLING_CODE_ID, BILLING_ORGANISATION_PERSON_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, COMMENTS, COST_CENTRE, CREATED_AS, ELEMENT_1, ELEMENT_2, ELEMENT_3, ELEMENT_4, ELEMENT_5, EQUIPMENT_DETAILS, EQUIPMENT_REQUIRED_YN, ETS_APPROVAL_NOTIFICATION_TO, EU_CONTACT_PERSON_ID, GST_EXEMPT, INVOICE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL, IS_DAILY, IS_START_END_TIME, JOB_TITLE, PAYROLL_NOTES, PAYSLIP_EMAIL, PAY_ARRANGEMENT, PAY_METHOD_ID, PREFERRED, RATE, RATE1, RATE2, RATE3, RATE4, RATE5, REFERENCE_NO_1, REFERENCE_NO_2, REFERENCE_NO_3, RESTRAINT_OF_TRADE, SERVICE_DESCRIPTION, SPECIAL_CONDITIONS, TERMINATION_NOTICE, TERMINATION_NOTICE_UNIT, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_ID, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_RATE_HIDDEN, TIMECARD_LAYOUT, TIMECARD_REQUIRED, TIMECARD_SECONDARY_APPROVAL_ID, TIMECARD_TERTIARY_APPROVAL_ID, TIMESHEET_NAME, TIMESHEET_UNITS, UNIT, WC_ORGANISATION_TYPE_FLAG, WC_ORG_CODE_RATE_LINK_ID, WORKING_STATE, WORK_END_TIME, WORK_START_TIME ) VALUES ( ${ASSIGNMENT_ID}, ${FROM_DATE}, ${TO_DATE}, ${CREATED_BY}, ${CREATION_DATE}, ${LAST_UPDATED_BY}, ${LAST_UPDATE_DATE}, ${PERSON_ID}, ${BILLING_ORGANISATION_ID}, ${EU_ORGANISATION_ID}, ${APPROVED_EXPENSES}, ${ASG_ACTIVE}, ${ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE}, ${ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER}, ${ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE}, ${ATTRIBUTE1}, ${ATTRIBUTE10}, ${ATTRIBUTE4}, ${ATTRIBUTE5}, ${ATTRIBUTE6}, ${ATTRIBUTE7}, ${ATTRIBUTE8}, ${ATTRIBUTE9}, ${AUTOMATIC_INVOICE}, ${BASIC_SALARY}, ${BILLING_CODE}, ${BILLING_CODE_ID}, ${BILLING_ORGANISATION_PERSON_ID}, ${BUSINESS_GROUP_ID}, ${COMMENTS}, ${COST_CENTRE}, ${CREATED_AS}, ${ELEMENT_1}, ${ELEMENT_2}, ${ELEMENT_3}, ${ELEMENT_4}, ${ELEMENT_5}, ${EQUIPMENT_DETAILS}, ${EQUIPMENT_REQUIRED_YN}, ${ETS_APPROVAL_NOTIFICATION_TO}, ${EU_CONTACT_PERSON_ID}, ${GST_EXEMPT}, ${INVOICE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL}, ${IS_DAILY}, ${IS_START_END_TIME}, ${JOB_TITLE}, ${PAYROLL_NOTES}, ${PAYSLIP_EMAIL}, ${PAY_ARRANGEMENT}, ${PAY_METHOD_ID}, ${PREFERRED}, ${RATE}, ${RATE1}, ${RATE2}, ${RATE3}, ${RATE4}, ${RATE5}, ${REFERENCE_NO_1}, ${REFERENCE_NO_2}, ${REFERENCE_NO_3}, ${RESTRAINT_OF_TRADE}, ${SERVICE_DESCRIPTION}, ${SPECIAL_CONDITIONS}, ${TERMINATION_NOTICE}, ${TERMINATION_NOTICE_UNIT}, ${TIMECARD_APPROVAL_ID}, ${TIMECARD_APPROVAL_RATE_HIDDEN}, ${TIMECARD_LAYOUT}, ${TIMECARD_REQUIRED}, ${TIMECARD_SECONDARY_APPROVAL_ID}, ${TIMECARD_TERTIARY_APPROVAL_ID}, ${TIMESHEET_NAME}, ${TIMESHEET_UNITS}, ${UNIT}, ${WC_ORGANISATION_TYPE_FLAG}, ${WC_ORG_CODE_RATE_LINK_ID}, ${WORKING_STATE}, ${WORK_END_TIME}, ${WORK_START_TIME} )

UPDATE HP_ASSIGNMENTS_D SET CREATED_BY = ${CREATED_BY}, CREATION_DATE = ${CREATION_DATE}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = ${LAST_UPDATED_BY}, LAST_UPDATE_DATE = ${LAST_UPDATE_DATE}, PERSON_ID = ${PERSON_ID}, BILLING_ORGANISATION_ID = ${BILLING_ORGANISATION_ID}, EU_ORGANISATION_ID = ${EU_ORGANISATION_ID}, APPROVED_EXPENSES = ${APPROVED_EXPENSES}, ASG_ACTIVE = ${ASG_ACTIVE}, ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE = ${ASSIGNMENT_END_DATE}, ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER = ${ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER}, ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE = ${ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE}, ATTRIBUTE1 = ${ATTRIBUTE1}, ATTRIBUTE10 = ${ATTRIBUTE10}, ATTRIBUTE4 = ${ATTRIBUTE4}, ATTRIBUTE5 = ${ATTRIBUTE5}, ATTRIBUTE6 = ${ATTRIBUTE6}, ATTRIBUTE7 = ${ATTRIBUTE7}, ATTRIBUTE8 = ${ATTRIBUTE8}, ATTRIBUTE9 = ${ATTRIBUTE9}, AUTOMATIC_INVOICE = ${AUTOMATIC_INVOICE}, BASIC_SALARY = ${BASIC_SALARY}, BILLING_CODE = ${BILLING_CODE}, BILLING_CODE_ID = ${BILLING_CODE_ID}, BILLING_ORGANISATION_PERSON_ID = ${BILLING_ORGANISATION_PERSON_ID}, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = ${BUSINESS_GROUP_ID}, COMMENTS = ${COMMENTS}, COST_CENTRE = ${COST_CENTRE}, CREATED_AS = ${CREATED_AS}, ELEMENT_1 = ${ELEMENT_1}, ELEMENT_2 = ${ELEMENT_2}, ELEMENT_3 = ${ELEMENT_3}, ELEMENT_4 = ${ELEMENT_4}, ELEMENT_5 = ${ELEMENT_5}, EQUIPMENT_DETAILS = ${EQUIPMENT_DETAILS}, EQUIPMENT_REQUIRED_YN = ${EQUIPMENT_REQUIRED_YN}, ETS_APPROVAL_NOTIFICATION_TO = ${ETS_APPROVAL_NOTIFICATION_TO}, EU_CONTACT_PERSON_ID = ${EU_CONTACT_PERSON_ID}, GST_EXEMPT = ${GST_EXEMPT}, INVOICE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL = ${INVOICE_RECIPIENT_EMAIL}, IS_DAILY = ${IS_DAILY}, IS_START_END_TIME = ${IS_START_END_TIME}, JOB_TITLE = ${JOB_TITLE}, PAYROLL_NOTES = ${PAYROLL_NOTES}, PAYSLIP_EMAIL = ${PAYSLIP_EMAIL}, PAY_ARRANGEMENT = ${PAY_ARRANGEMENT}, PAY_METHOD_ID = ${PAY_METHOD_ID}, PREFERRED = ${PREFERRED}, RATE = ${RATE}, RATE1 = ${RATE1}, RATE2 = ${RATE2}, RATE3 = ${RATE3}, RATE4 = ${RATE4}, RATE5 = ${RATE5}, REFERENCE_NO_1 = ${REFERENCE_NO_1}, REFERENCE_NO_2 = ${REFERENCE_NO_2}, REFERENCE_NO_3 = ${REFERENCE_NO_3}, RESTRAINT_OF_TRADE = ${RESTRAINT_OF_TRADE}, SERVICE_DESCRIPTION = ${SERVICE_DESCRIPTION}, SPECIAL_CONDITIONS = ${SPECIAL_CONDITIONS}, TERMINATION_NOTICE = ${TERMINATION_NOTICE}, TERMINATION_NOTICE_UNIT = ${TERMINATION_NOTICE_UNIT}, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_ID = ${TIMECARD_APPROVAL_ID}, TIMECARD_APPROVAL_RATE_HIDDEN = ${TIMECARD_APPROVAL_RATE_HIDDEN}, TIMECARD_LAYOUT = ${TIMECARD_LAYOUT}, TIMECARD_REQUIRED = ${TIMECARD_REQUIRED}, TIMECARD_SECONDARY_APPROVAL_ID = ${TIMECARD_SECONDARY_APPROVAL_ID}, TIMECARD_TERTIARY_APPROVAL_ID = ${TIMECARD_TERTIARY_APPROVAL_ID}, TIMESHEET_NAME = ${TIMESHEET_NAME}, TIMESHEET_UNITS = ${TIMESHEET_UNITS}, UNIT = ${UNIT}, WC_ORGANISATION_TYPE_FLAG = ${WC_ORGANISATION_TYPE_FLAG}, WC_ORG_CODE_RATE_LINK_ID = ${WC_ORG_CODE_RATE_LINK_ID}, WORKING_STATE = ${WORKING_STATE}, WORK_END_TIME = ${WORK_END_TIME}, WORK_START_TIME = ${WORK_START_TIME} WHERE 1 = 1 ${frameworkGeneratedWhere}
